name: Pika 2.5
description: Pika 2.5 - Subject + Action + Setting + Camera; restrained adjectives; 5-10s clips; Pikaframes for transitions
examplePrompts: A golden retriever wearing sunglasses, walking through Times Square at night, neon reflections on the sidewalk, cinematic slow zoom.
POV of a bird flying over the ocean at dusk with long shadows, wind rushing past, dynamic motion.
Cartoon chef flipping pancakes in bright kitchen, overhead shot, warm morning light, playful mood.
